nasb.text: The foundation was of costly stones, even large stones, stones of ten cubits and stones of eight cubits.

esv.text: The foundation was of costly stones, huge stones, stones of eight and ten cubits.

cnv.text: 根基也都是用貴重的大石塊；有長四公尺的，也有長三公尺半的。

ccb.text: 根基用的是非常珍贵的石头，它们的体积巨大，有些甚至是长达三米半至四米半的巨石，
